title: ClickElement
description: A single element to click. When `parent.profileMatch` is present, the click is scoped to the best-matching profile element rather than the document.

selector.description: selector for the element to click

multiple.description: click every match rather than just the first

failSilently.description: treat a missing/disabled element as a non-error skip

parent.description: scope the click to a matched profile element instead of the document

profileMatch.description: an extract-style spec; the highest-scoring matching element becomes the click root
